agent_feed.message: Initiating Aegis Comm Link and syncing Phase 2 Execution Gate.
Missing null safety on activeHistoryPoints. Cannot proceed.
Massive prop bloat detected. 8 unused properties drilled from parent component. Missing TypeScript interface for ProfileTrendsTabProps.
Applied TS interfaces. Cleared 8 props from AssociateProfileModal.tsx. Replaced activeHistoryPoints mapping with robust optional chaining.
Typecheck and Test suite passes. E2E locators present. Approving Phase 3 transition.
Phase 2 Execution Gate initiated for ProfileTrophiesTab.tsx. Spawning QA and Tech Debt agents.
Null Safety Trap: employee.trophies will crash if employee is undefined before hydration completes. Missing data-testids.
Missing TS interfaces for ProfileTrophiesTabProps. getIcon parameter is implicitly any.

Refactored ProfileTrophiesTab.tsx. Typed props with local interfaces, applied optional chaining to employee state, eradicated raw hex colors for design tokens, mapped array keys, and inserted data-testids.
Null traps eliminated. Playwright E2E locators are present. Quality Gate 100% SUCCESS. Proceeding.
Phase 2 Execution Gate initiated for AuraActionCard.tsx. Spawning QA and Tech Debt agents.
Missing TS Interfaces (Rule 16). employee is typed as 'any'. Missing cursor-pointer class on button (Rule 5).
Async Race Condition: Coach Now button not disabled while isScanning. Missing data-testids. Null Pointer Risk on employee.
Refactored AuraActionCard.tsx. Applied Employee interfaces, eradicated implicit any types, injected component hydration guards, fixed async coaching logic, and attached data-testids.
Race conditions and null traps removed. Types are strict. Playwright locators verified. 100% Quality Gate pass.

Refactored GoalsSlide.tsx. Eradicated raw style elements. Mapped to premium tokens (--bg-obsidian). Added TS interface MetricGoal. Eliminated division by zero risk.
Math checks out. TestIDs injected correctly. 100% Quality Gate pass.
Phase 2 Execution Gate initiated for LeaderboardSlide.tsx. Spawning QA and Tech Debt agents.
Premium Design Tokens violation (Rule 7 & 10). Missing TS interface (Rule 16). Missing component hydration guards (Rule 18).

Refactored LeaderboardSlide.tsx. Replaced inline styles with Tailwind + CSS variables. Added Employee array type. Added guard clause for empty arrays to prevent crashes.
Array hydration bounds verified. Test IDs present. Quality Gate Passed.
Phase 2 Execution Gate initiated for WinsSlide.tsx. Spawning QA and Tech Debt agents.
Styling Mandate Violations. TypeScript any Violations. Null-Safety Risk on name.charAt. React Keys Anti-Pattern.

Refactored WinsSlide.tsx. Added WinRecord interface. Replaced React array keys with ids. Safe property access for null fields. Replaced inline styles with utility tokens.
Safe access and array hydration bounds verified. Test IDs present. Quality Gate Passed.
